description: Create an Eriksen Flanker Task experiment in PsychoPy Builder. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/flanker_task.psyexp and the required conditions file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/flanker_conditions.csv. The conditions file must include columns for 'stimulus', 'condition', and 'corrAns', with at least four rows representing congruent (e.g., >>>>>) and incongruent (e.g., <<><<) trials where 'corrAns' indicates the center arrow direction. The experiment must feature an instruction routine, a loop with at least two repetitions containing fixation and trial routines, and an end routine. The trial routine must display the stimulus and record keyboard responses (left/right) using the variables defined in the conditions file.
